_instructions: Create this bot in the Amazon Lex V2 console (us-west-2):
1. Go to Amazon Lex → Bots → Create bot
3. IAM role: Create a role with basic Lex permissions
9. In Amazon Connect console: Contact Flows → add the Lex bot as a resource
description: Sandbox bot for Veratrace warming — handles password resets, balance checks, and routes billing disputes to humans.

intents.name: ResetPassword
intents.description: Customer wants to reset their password. Bot auto-resolves.
sampleUtterances: I need to reset my password

slots.name: AccountEmail
slots.prompt: What email is associated with your account?

intents.confirmationPrompt: I'll send a password reset link to {AccountEmail}. Is that correct?
intents.fulfillmentMessage: Done — a password reset link has been sent to your email. Is there anything else I can help with?
intents.closingResponse: Thanks for contacting us. Have a great day!

intents.name: CheckBalance
intents.description: Customer wants to check their account balance. Bot auto-resolves.
intents.fulfillmentMessage: Your current balance is $127.50. Your next payment of $45.00 is due on the 15th. Anything else?
intents.closingResponse: Thanks for checking in. Have a great day!

intents.name: BillingDispute
intents.description: Customer wants to dispute a charge. Bot cannot resolve — transfers to human agent.
sampleUtterances: I want to dispute a charge
there's a wrong charge on my account

slots.name: DisputeAmount
slots.prompt: What's the amount of the charge you'd like to dispute?

intents.fulfillmentMessage: I understand you'd like to dispute a charge of ${DisputeAmount}. Let me connect you with a billing specialist who can help.
intents._behavior: TRANSFER_TO_QUEUE — this intent should trigger a transfer to the BillingQueue in the contact flow

intents.name: FallbackIntent
intents.description: Catches everything the bot doesn't understand. Transfers to human.
intents.closingResponse: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Let me connect you with someone who can help.
